title: Opinion: Opinion | Forget Coding. The World's Hottest Jobs Now Belong To Plumbers, Electricians
summary_full: As many as 85% of companies in blue-collar industries say they have unfilled vacancies - even as world's most talented coders and engineers are going unemployed.
summary_public: As many as 85% of companies in blue-collar industries say they have unfilled vacancies - even as world's most talented coders and engineers are going unemployed.
